---
title: "History of Edward the Black Prince and of various events connected therewith, which occurred during the reign of Edward III, King of England"
---

## History of Edward the Black Prince and of various events connected therewith, which occurred during the reign of Edward III, King of England

**Author:** G. P. R. James
**Date:** 1836
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
